service.name: Hugging Face Inference API
service.description_for_ai: Run 300,000+ open-source ML models via API. Text generation, classification, translation, image generation, audio. Free tier available. Access to Llama, Mistral, SDXL, Whisper and thousands of specialized models.

auth.cost: Free tier available. PRO: $9/month for priority

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text using any Hugging Face model. Use model ID like meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct or mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct.

agent_hints.cold_start: Free tier models sleep — first request may take 20-30s. Use wait_for_model=true.
agent_hints.model_search: Search models at huggingface.co/models — filter by task (text-generation, image-classification etc.)
